name: Apyx Medical Corp
summary: Apyx Medical Corporation is a surgical aesthetics company headquartered in Clearwater, FL, focused on innovative medical devices. Its core products include Renuvion and AYON Body Contouring System, both based on its proprietary Helium Plasma Platform Technology, used in cosmetic surgery markets. It also sells J-Plasma for hospital surgical markets and generates revenue through OEM agreements with other medical device manufacturers leveraging its waveform expertise.

products.name: Renuvion
products.description: Helium Plasma Platform Technology device for tissue contraction used in cosmetic surgery market.

products.name: AYON Body Contouring System
products.description: FDA-cleared all-in-one body contouring system integrating fat removal, tissue contraction, and electrosurgical capabilities.

products.name: J-Plasma
products.description: Helium Plasma Technology device marketed and sold in the hospital surgical market.

partnerships.description: Apyx Medical leverages waveform expertise through OEM agreements with other medical device manufacturers.
